text: What if the money you've spent leads you to terrible choices? That’s the sunk cost fallacy—sticking with a decision based on past investments. Ever found yourself finishing a bad movie just because you bought the ticket? Studies show this can lead to poor outcomes, especially in investments and relationships. The key? Recognize when to cut your losses instead of clinging to past costs. Think about your choices—are you falling for the sunk cost fallacy? Like and share if you found this insightful!
